dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The kingdom of Imperia was renowned for many things: its sprawling emerald forests, its towering, majestic castles, and most notably...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: ...its incredibly beautiful royal family.

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) And then there's me. Princess Gwendolyn, the 'Cursed Princess'.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) Another morning. Another day to face the mirror.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SIGH

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) My sisters, Maria and Lorena, wake up looking like goddesses. Their hair perfectly coiffed, skin glowing, eyes sparkling.

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) Me? I wake up looking like I wrestled a badger in my sleep. And lost.

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) My nose is a bit... prominent. My chin, a tad too strong. And my hair... well, it has a mind of its own. A very chaotic mind.

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) Father says it's 'character'. Mother says it's 'unique'. But I know what they really mean. I'm the 'plain' one. The 'unfortunate' one.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KNOCK KNOCK

dialogue.speaker: Maid
dialogue.line: Princess Gwendolyn? Breakfast is served!

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: Coming!

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) Time to put on my brave face. Or, at least, a face that won't scare the royal chef.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLINK CLATTER

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.line: Ah, Gwendolyn, my dear! There you are! Just in time for my famous royal pancakes!

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: Good morning, Father. Mother. Maria, Lorena.

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.line: My sweet Gwendolyn, you look... rested.

dialogue.speaker: Maria
dialogue.line: Your hair has such... volume today, Gwen! It's like a fluffy cloud!

dialogue.speaker: Lorena
dialogue.line: Yes, so... natural! Not like our boring, sleek locks.

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) A fluffy cloud. That's one way to put it. A fluffy, untamed, slightly singed cloud.

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.line: Nonsense, girls! Gwendolyn has a noble countenance! A face that tells a story!

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) The story of a princess who accidentally walked into a beehive.

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.line: Speaking of stories, Gwendolyn, I've arranged for you to attend the Royal Ball in the neighboring kingdom of Eldoria next month. Perhaps you'll find a suitor!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHOKE

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: A suitor? Father, you know how these things usually go.

dialogue.speaker: Maria
dialogue.line: Oh, but you're so charming, Gwen! You'll sweep them off their feet with your wit!

dialogue.speaker: Lorena
dialogue.line: And your lovely, warm smile!

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) They mean the one where my nose wrinkles a bit too much and I look like I'm about to sneeze.

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.line: Exactly! Now, eat up! You'll need your strength for all that charming!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GULP

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) Later that afternoon, I decided a walk in the gardens might clear my head. Or at least, help me avoid thinking about forced charming.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) The roses were particularly vibrant today. Unlike my prospects.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: Oh! What's this?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Lying on the path, almost hidden by a patch of lavender, was a small, intricately folded piece of parchment.

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) It has a peculiar crest. A broken crown, surrounded by thorns...

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (reading) 'To Princess Gwendolyn of Imperia. You are cordially invited to a gathering of kindred spirits. Tonight, under the crescent moon. The Cursed Princess Club.'

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) The Cursed Princess Club? Is this some kind of cruel joke? Or... could it be real?

dialogue.speaker: Gwen
dialogue.line: (thought) My heart is pounding. For the first time, I feel a flicker of something other than resignation. Curiosity. And maybe... a tiny bit of hope.

summary: Princess Gwendolyn, feeling self-conscious about her 'cursed' appearance compared to her beautiful sisters, navigates a well-meaning but oblivious royal family breakfast. Later, during a walk in the palace gardens, she discovers a mysterious invitation to the 'Cursed Princess Club'.
